name: @giuseppecrj/pi-engineering-workflow
description_en: Personal Pi engineering workflow package with in-repo pi-goals, pi-review, Skill Foundry skills, workflow commands, prompts, and reusable goal templates.
description_zh: 个人 Pi 工程工作流包，包含存储库内的 pi-goals、pi-review、Skill Foundry 技能、工作流命令、提示词和可重用的目标模板
